title: paeonia mascula subsp. triternata
intro: Paeonia mascula subsp. triternata, also known as the Turkish peony or three-part peony, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Paeonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of Paeonia mascula subsp. triternata include dried roots, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
